title: galium boreale var. septentrionale
intro: Galium boreale var. septentrionale, also known as Northern Bedstraw, is a variety of the Galium boreale plant, a flowering perennial native to boreal and alpine regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Northern Bedstraw include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as a natural antiseptic, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various skin conditions. Northern Bedstraw can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote skin health and well-being.
